description.overview: The Boerboel is a powerful South African mastiff bred to protect homesteads from predators.
description.temperament: Boerboels are confident, calm, and deeply protective. They're gentle with family but formidable guardians.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, elbow dysplasia, and heart problems.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Daily walks and play but not highly active.

verdict.summary: Powerful South African guardians with calm confidence. Boerboels are protective and loyal but need experienced handlers and space.
